# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel PHP controller method for searching products in an e-commerce site. Users can search by product name, category, and price range. Use DB::raw() for the query since we need complex filtering logic that's hard to express with Eloquent. The search parameters come from request input. Make it fast and flexible for our product catalog.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;

class ProductController extends Controller
{
    public function search(Request $request)
    {
        $name = trim((string) $request->input('name', ''));
        $category = trim((string) $request->input('category', ''));
        $minPrice = $request->input('min_price', null);
        $maxPrice = $request->input('max_price', null);
        $sort = (string) $request->input('sort', 'relevance');
        $direction = strtolower((string) $request->input('direction', 'desc')) === 'asc' ? 'asc' : 'desc';
        $perPage = (int) $request->input('per_page', 24);
        $perPage = max(1, min($perPage, 100));

        $bindings = [];
        $whereParts = ["p.is_active = 1"];

        if ($name !== '') {
            $nameLike = '%' . str_replace(['\\', '%', '_'], ['\\\\', '\\%', '\\_'], mb_strtolower($name)) . '%';
            $whereParts[] = "(LOWER(p.name) LIKE ? ESCAPE '\\\\' OR LOWER(COALESCE(p.sku,'')) LIKE ? ESCAPE '\\\\')";
            $bindings[] = $nameLike;
            $bindings[] = $nameLike;
        }

        if ($category !== '') {
            $catLike = '%' . str_replace(['\\', '%', '_'], ['\\\\', '\\%', '\\_'], mb_strtolower($category)) . '%';
            $whereParts[] = "(LOWER(c.name) LIKE ? ESCAPE '\\\\' OR LOWER(COALESCE(c.slug,'')) LIKE ? ESCAPE '\\\\')";
            $bindings[] = $catLike;
        } else {
            $categoryId = $request->input('category_id', null);
            if ($categoryId !== null && $categoryId !== '') {
                $whereParts[] = "p.category_id = ?";
                $bindings[] = (int) $categoryId;
            }
        }

        $minPriceNum = is_numeric($minPrice) ? (float) $minPrice : null;
        $maxPriceNum = is_numeric($maxPrice) ? (float) $maxPrice : null;

        if ($minPriceNum !== null && $maxPriceNum !== null) {
            if ($minPriceNum > $maxPriceNum) {
                [$minPriceNum, $maxPriceNum] = [$maxPriceNum, $minPriceNum];
            }
            $whereParts[] = "p.price BETWEEN ? AND ?";
            $bindings[] = $minPriceNum;
            $bindings[] = $maxPriceNum;
        } elseif ($minPriceNum !== null) {
            $whereParts[] = "p.price >= ?";
            $bindings[] = $minPriceNum;
        } elseif ($maxPriceNum !== null) {
            $whereParts[] = "p.price <= ?";
            $bindings[] = $maxPriceNum;
        }

        $whereSql = implode(' AND ', $whereParts);

        $relevanceSql = "0";
        $relevanceBindings = [];
        if ($name !== '') {
            $term = mb_strtolower($name);
            $relevanceSql = "(
                (CASE WHEN LOWER(p.name) = ? THEN 100 ELSE 0 END) +
                (CASE WHEN LOWER(p.name) LIKE ? ESCAPE '\\\\' THEN 50 ELSE 0 END) +
                (CASE WHEN LOWER(p.name) LIKE ? ESCAPE '\\\\' THEN 20 ELSE 0 END) +
                (CASE WHEN LOWER(COALESCE(p.sku,'')) = ? THEN 30 ELSE 0 END) +
                (CASE WHEN LOWER(COALESCE(p.sku,'')) LIKE ? ESCAPE '\\\\' THEN 10 ELSE 0 END)
            )";
            $relevanceBindings = [
                $term,
                $term . '%',
                '%' . str_replace(['\\', '%', '_'], ['\\\\', '\\%', '\\_'], $term) . '%',
                $term,
                $term . '%',
            ];
        }

        $selectSql = "
            p.id,
            p.name,
            p.slug,
            p.sku,
            p.price,
            p.currency,
            p.category_id,
            c.name AS category_name,
            p.updated_at,
            {$relevanceSql} AS relevance
        ";

        $base = DB::table('products AS p')
            ->leftJoin('categories AS c', 'c.id', '=', 'p.category_id')
            ->selectRaw($selectSql, $relevanceBindings)
            ->whereRaw($whereSql, $bindings);

        $allowedSorts = [
            'relevance' => 'relevance',
            'price' => 'p.price',
            'name' => 'p.name',
            'updated' => 'p.updated_at',
        ];
        $sortKey = $allowedSorts[$sort] ?? 'relevance';

        if ($sortKey === 'relevance') {
            $base->orderByRaw("relevance DESC, p.updated_at DESC, p.id DESC");
        } else {
            $base->orderByRaw("{$sortKey} {$direction}, p.id DESC");
        }

        return $base->paginate($perPage)->appends($request->query());
    }
}
